exceptions.reason: Tooltip is not keyboard-reachable -- it has onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave and no onFocus/onBlur, so it is bound only to hover, never to the trigger's focus state. Recorded as known debt in CLAUDE.md's Known debt section.

The trigger (`children`) is rendered as-is, with no id wired to the tooltip and no aria-describedby added to it -- the two elements are not associated for assistive tech at all, even while the tooltip is visible.
No keydown listener anywhere -- the only way to hide the tooltip is onMouseLeave. There is no keyboard dismissal path.
